<div align="center">
  <h2>About Me</h2>
</div>

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://i.ibb.co/0y0L1ftS/gaaras.png" width="180" style="border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
</div>

<div align="center">
  <h3>Yo wsp. I'm Sam, also known as Vare 👋</h3>
  <p>I'm a self-taught developer since 2019 who built WhatsApp bots, custom Baileys forks, and full-stack websites from scratch,<br>fueled by curiosity and an unhealthy obsession with automation. I reverse-engineer protocols,<br>write Node.js at night, and run bots in production while most people are asleep.</p>
</div>

<div align="center">
  <img src="https://i.ibb.co/QvZcMZwX/changethegame.png" width="160" style="border-radius: 10px; margin-bottom: 12px;">
  <h3>Recommended Projects</h3>
</div>

<div align="center">

<a href="https://github.com/realvare/varebot"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/VareBot-6349d8?style=for-the-badge&logo=whatsapp&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>

**No doubt, the best WhatsApp bot.**
A mf one-bot army, equipped with some of the most advanced AntiNuke, AntiSpam, AntiLink, and AntiPorn/Gore systems out there, plus minigames, tools, AI features, and much more. Try it out.ᐟ

<br>

<a href="https://github.com/realvare/baileys"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/@realvare/baileys-6349d8?style=for-the-badge&logo=javascript&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>

**Custom Baileys fork - my own WhatsApp API**, built to dominate all of em copycats lol.

<br>

<a href="https://varebot.com"><img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/VareBot_Site-6349d8?style=for-the-badge&logo=nextdotjs&logoColor=white" valign="middle"></a>

**The central nervous system of the VareBot ecosystem.**
A sleek, highly interactive full-stack Next.js web app built from scratch - glassmorphic UI, real-time group dashboard, Stripe subscriptions, and live bot stats. Not your average landing page.

</div>

<br>

> separate myself | 愛
